{{nihongo|'''Nihitsukino Shrine'''|新次神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Harima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nihitsukino Shrine'''|新次神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Harima Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nihitsukino Shrine'''|新次神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Harima Province]].
